text: Moving from the quiet, almost clinical emptiness of the hallway into this vibrant, intellectually stimulating exhibit, I feel a sudden shift. The transition enhances my awareness of how environment shapes mood and thought. Here, surrounded by colors, screens, and words about innovation, curiosity mixes with a sense of exhilaration. It feels as though ideas are alive, ready to be plucked from the air. The world here is not only observed but contemplated, questioned, and perhaps even gently challenged.
